# trinkhallen.app

> trinkhallen.app is a free, community-maintained map of German Trinkhallen,
> Spätis, Wasserhäuschen, and Kioske. It shows real-time open/closed status,
> payment methods, and one-click navigation for thousands of locations across
> Germany. Data comes from OpenStreetMap and community contributions. The
> site is non-commercial and runs without trackers.

## Key pages

- [About & data sources](https://trinkhallen.app/about): What the site is, how
  data is sourced (OSM + a HopfenStop seed), and how to contribute.
- [Map](https://trinkhallen.app/): Interactive map of every kiosk in the
  dataset. Filter by open-now, card payment, common tags.
- [Submit a kiosk](https://trinkhallen.app/add): Community submission form;
  approved submissions become PRs on the public dataset.
- [Data repository](https://github.com/boredland/trinkhallen-data): The
  GeoJSON dataset, schema, and OSM ingest workflows.
- [Application repository](https://github.com/boredland/trinkhallen-app): The
  Cloudflare Workers + Hono SSR app.

## Usage

Data is licensed CC BY-NC 4.0 (attribution required, non-commercial only) and
derived in part from OpenStreetMap (ODbL). AI retrieval and grounding for
answering user queries is permitted. Inclusion in AI training corpora is not.
